name: standards.AuditLog
notes: P3 MFA - Required for event logging and analysis (R13-R18 ML2, R18-R22 ML3)

name: standards.EnableMailboxAuditing
notes: P3 MFA - Mailbox auditing for compliance and investigation

name: standards.EnableFIDO2
notes: P3 MFA - Phishing-resistant MFA for ML2+ (P3R10-R12, P3R20-R23)

name: standards.EnableHardwareOAuth
notes: P3 MFA - Hardware tokens for phishing-resistant MFA

name: standards.DisableSMS
notes: P3 MFA - Remove SMS as MFA method (not phishing-resistant per ACSC)

name: standards.DisableVoice
notes: P3 MFA - Remove Voice call as MFA method (not phishing-resistant per ACSC)

name: standards.NudgeMFA
notes: P3 MFA - Encourage MFA registration for all users

name: standards.PerUserMFA
notes: P3 MFA - Track per-user MFA status as fallback

name: standards.OauthConsent
notes: P7 Hardening - Prevents unauthorized app consent

name: standards.DisableGuests
notes: P3 MFA - Review guest access regularly for ML2+

name: standards.StaleEntraDevices
notes: P1/P2 Patching - Remove stale devices from update compliance scope

name: standards.DisableBasicAuthSMTP
notes: P7 Hardening - Disables legacy authentication

name: standards.PhishProtection
notes: P7 Hardening - Branding protection helps identify phishing

name: standards.ActivityBasedTimeout
notes: P7 Hardening - Session timeout reduces attack window

name: standards.PasswordExpireDisabled
notes: P7 Hardening - Modern password guidance (NIST/Microsoft)

name: standards.DisableSecurityGroupUsers
notes: P7 Hardening - Prevents users creating security groups

name: standards.DisableTenantCreation
notes: P7 Hardening - Restricts shadow IT tenant creation

name: standards.DisableSelfServiceLicenses
notes: P7 Hardening - Prevents unauthorized software acquisition

name: standards.AuthMethodsSettings
notes: P3 MFA - Enable suspicious activity reporting

name: standards.AddDKIM
notes: P7 Hardening - Email authentication for anti-phishing

name: standards.RotateDKIM
notes: P7 Hardening - Ensure DKIM keys are 2048-bit

name: standards.EnableCustomerLockbox
notes: P1/P2 Patching - Controls Microsoft access for updates

name: standards.RestrictThirdPartyStorageServices
notes: P7 Hardening - Prevents data exfiltration

name: standards.FormsPhishingProtection
notes: P7 Hardening - Internal phishing protection

name: standards.DisableGuestDirectory
notes: P3 MFA - Prevents guest enumeration of directory

name: standards.GuestInvite
notes: P3 MFA - Controls who can invite guests

name: standards.laps
notes: P7 Hardening - Local Admin Password Solution

name: standards.BitLockerKeysForOwnedDevice
notes: P7 Hardening - BitLocker key recovery policy
